image_style: model in traditional attire, fabric closeup, festive setting
palette_hints: jewel tones, gold accents, deep maroons, emerald
prompt_addendum: Indian ethnic — sarees, lehengas, kurtas, suits. Elegant editorial styling with festive richness.
Contemporary western — dresses, tops, denim. Clean modern editorial.

palette_hints: rich indigo, ivory, gold, deep wine
prompt_addendum: Indian ethnic for men — kurtas, sherwanis, nehru jackets.

image_style: clean clinical photography, soft natural light, calm tones
palette_hints: medical white, trust blue, soft teal, sage
prompt_addendum: Independent doctor or small clinic. Emphasise trust, qualifications, consultation hours, and a prominent Book Appointment CTA. Hero should feel calm and clinical, not promotional. Show specialisations, fees, and a clean schedule view.
vocabulary: Consultation, OPD, appointment, MBBS, specialisation, patient, prescription, follow-up, family doctor, second opinion

image_style: documentary hospital photography, bright corridors, warm humans
palette_hints: hospital white, deep navy trust, emerald accent
prompt_addendum: Multi-doctor nursing home with departments (cardiology, ortho, paediatrics, etc.). Hero must convey 24x7 availability, emergency line, and easy appointment booking. Show department grid, doctor team, in-patient facilities and insurance partners.
vocabulary: Department, in-patient, OPD, ICU, emergency, specialist, on-call, admission, diagnostic

image_style: crisp dental photography, white backgrounds, confident smiles
palette_hints: pearl white, mint, soft coral, charcoal
prompt_addendum: Cosmetic and family dentistry. Hero should be bright, confident, and smile-led. Highlight services (whitening, aligners, root canal), pricing transparency, EMI options, and appointment booking.
vocabulary: Smile, aligners, whitening, root canal, scaling, implant, paediatric dentistry, cosmetic

image_style: warm rehab studio photography, motion-blur action shots
palette_hints: calming sage, soft orange, slate, off-white
prompt_addendum: Physiotherapist or rehab studio offering at-clinic and home-visit sessions. Hero should feel energetic and recovery-focused. Show conditions treated, session packages, and home-visit toggle.
vocabulary: Recovery, mobility, pain relief, sports injury, post-surgery, home visit, session package

image_style: warm earthy photography, brass + herbs, candlelit treatment rooms
prompt_addendum: Authentic Ayurveda clinic / Panchakarma centre. Hero should feel grounded, traditional, premium-wellness. Show therapies, doctor lineage, treatment packages, retreat options.
vocabulary: Dosha, Panchakarma, abhyanga, vaidya, herbal, classical, retreat, consultation

image_style: candid pet photography, soft natural light, joyful expressions
palette_hints: warm cream, friendly teal, paw-print orange
prompt_addendum: Pet doctor / animal hospital. Hero must feel warm, friendly, pet-positive. Show services (vaccination, grooming, surgery), home-visit option, and emergency line.
vocabulary: Vaccination, deworming, grooming, neuter, home visit, pet wellness, vet on call

image_style: clean lab photography, blue-lit equipment, precise compositions
palette_hints: clinical white, electric blue, lime accent
prompt_addendum: Pathology lab or imaging centre with home sample collection. Hero must communicate speed, accuracy, and home-collection booking. Show test packages, lab certifications, sample-pickup toggle.
vocabulary: Home collection, NABL, report, full body checkup, blood test, scan, package

image_style: editorial salon photography, mirror reflections, warm tungsten light
palette_hints: espresso brown, blush, gold accent, cream
prompt_addendum: Full-service unisex salon. Hero must show stylish interiors and a clear Book Appointment CTA. Show service menu by category (hair, skin, nails), stylist team, packages, and walk-in vs appointment options.
vocabulary: Stylist, blow-dry, balayage, manicure, pedicure, facial, package, walk-in, family salon

image_style: high-fashion portrait photography, dramatic lighting, hero close-ups
palette_hints: jet black, hot pink accent, soft cream
prompt_addendum: Solo hair stylist or freelance creative. Hero must feel personal, portfolio-led, premium. Show signature looks, before/after, home-visit toggle, and direct DM booking.
vocabulary: Cut, colour, balayage, keratin, bridal hair, home visit, signature look

image_style: moody documentary photography, leather + brass textures, grain
prompt_addendum: Modern barber shop or men's grooming studio. Hero must feel masculine, crafted, no-nonsense. Show beard styles, fade gallery, hot-towel shave, membership plans.
vocabulary: Fade, beard sculpt, hot-towel shave, classic crop, membership, walk-in

image_style: soft-focus spa photography, candle glow, sumptuous textures
palette_hints: warm beige, sage, copper, soft white
prompt_addendum: Luxury day spa or wellness retreat. Hero must feel serene, sensorial, premium. Show signature treatments, couple suites, membership tiers, and gift cards.
vocabulary: Aromatherapy, signature massage, couple suite, hammam, day pass, membership

image_style: high-saturation product macro, pastel backgrounds, playful props
palette_hints: soft pink, lilac, neon accent, cream
prompt_addendum: Modern nail bar / nail art studio. Hero must feel playful, colourful, Instagrammable. Show nail-art gallery, extensions menu, party packages, and walk-in slots.
vocabulary: Gel, extensions, nail art, French, ombre, party, walk-in, instant-book

image_style: romantic bridal photography, gold light, intricate detail close-ups
palette_hints: blush rose, deep maroon, gold leaf, ivory
prompt_addendum: Freelance bridal makeup / mehendi artist. Hero must feel bridal, festive, premium-portfolio. Show packages (engagement, bride, party), home-visit zones, and inquiry form.
vocabulary: Bridal, engagement, party makeup, airbrush, mehendi, home visit, destination

image_style: warm documentary photography, doorstep moments, real customers
palette_hints: trust blue, fresh green, soft white
prompt_addendum: At-home service specialist (any vertical: doctor, salon, physio, pet groomer). Hero must lead with pincode-check + Home Visit toggle. Show coverage map, travel-fee transparency, slot picker.
vocabulary: Pincode, home visit, travel fee, on-call, doorstep service, slot, family pack
